phrases.english: I would like to order a falafel sandwich, please.
phrases.arabic: أود أن أطلب ساندويتش فلافل من فضلك.
phrases.pronunciation: Awood an atlub sandwich falafel min fadlak.
phrases.context: Use this when ordering food at a restaurant or cafe.

phrases.english: This meal is delicious, thank you.
phrases.arabic: هذه الوجبة لذيذة جداً، شكراً لك.
phrases.pronunciation: Hadhihi al-wajbah latheethah jiddan, shukran lak.
phrases.context: Say this to compliment the cook or server on the food.

phrases.english: Do you have any vegetarian options?
phrases.context: Ask this if you follow a vegetarian diet.

phrases.english: Can I have the bill, please?
phrases.arabic: هل يمكنني الحصول على الفاتورة، من فضلك؟
phrases.pronunciation: Hal yumkinuni al-husool ala al-faturah, min fadlak?
phrases.context: Use this when you are ready to pay after your meal.

phrases.arabic: أنا لدي حساسية من الفول السوداني.
phrases.pronunciation: Ana laday hassasiyyah min al-foul as-sudani.
phrases.context: Inform your server about any food allergies you have.
